data.name: Notification_LanguageChangeRequiresScreenChange
data.value: Change screens to update the language.

data.name: Screen_Main_QuitDialogMessage
data.value: Are you sure you would like to quit the game?

data.name: Screen_Main_MultiplayerDescription
data.value: Play custom matches online with others

data.name: Screen_Main_CompetitiveDescription
data.value: Compete against players all over the world

data.name: Screen_Main_MapEditorDescription
data.value: Create or edit a map to any song you'd like

data.name: Screen_Main_DownloadMapsDescription
data.value: Find new songs from the community to play

data.name: Screen_Main_TipOpenOptions
data.value: Pressing CTRL+O will open the options menu.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipImportMapFiles
data.value: Drag map files (.qp) into the game to import them.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipMapPreview
data.value: Pressing F3 in song select displays a map preview.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipPauseSubmission
data.value: Pausing in gameplay prevents score submission.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipReportBug
data.value: You can report a bug by opening a GitHub issue.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipRequestFeatures
data.value: Request new features by opening GitHub issues!

data.name: Screen_Main_TipCreateMap
data.value: Drag a .mp3 file in the game to create a new map!

data.name: Screen_Main_TipRandomSong
data.value: Pressing F2 in song select chooses a random song.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipPlayercard
data.value: Pressing F10 in the menu opens your playercard.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipScrollSpeed
data.value: Pressing F3/F4 in gameplay changes scroll speed.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipCalibrateOffset
data.value: Your offset can be calibrated in the options menu.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipDefaultJudgement
data.value: Standard* is the default judgement window preset.

data.name: Screen_Main_TipPlaybackRate
data.value: CTRL+ +/- changes the playback rate of the song.
